# Session Summary

This session lived in `/Users/test/Projects/myproject` on branch `main`.

It dispatched three subagents to inspect the parser, the renderer, and the
exporter. Each subagent left a transcript in `subagents/`.

The session itself stored its top-level events in this UUID-named directory
(no flat `<uuid>.jsonl` next to it) — this is the alternative storage form
used by newer Claude Code versions.
